content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — user-facing string "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" in App/SettingsView.swift:12 describes a shipped feature in beta-like language.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may read "Experimental" combined with "may be unstable and lose sort order" as an admission the feature is unfinished, which can trigger 2.1/2.2 completeness questions even though it's not literally "beta" or "TestFlight" wording. Metadata and release notes are clean, so the issue is isolated to this toggle's caption. Consider rewording to something like "New: AI Sort (may be adjusted in future updates)" or ensure the feature is fully stable before shipping the label.
